component.project_license: ISC AND BSD-3-Clause AND BSD-2-Clause AND LGPL-2.1-only AND GPL-3.0-only AND LGPL-2.1-or-later AND MIT AND LGPL-3.0-or-later
component.name: opentrack
component.summary: Head tracking software for MS Windows, Linux, and Apple OSX

description.p: opentrack is a program for tracking user's head rotation and transmitting it to flight simulation software and military-themed video games.
